action_set_definitions.name: get_ed_census
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current lists of patients in the waiting room and active cases, including their IDs, clinical status, and triage levels.

patient_id.description: Optional: Filter for a specific patient ID.

action_set_definitions.name: get_room_status
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a detailed inventory of all treatment and exam rooms, showing occupancy, current patient ID, and whether a patient has discharge clearance.

action_set_definitions.name: discharge_patient
action_set_definitions.description: Formally discharges a patient from a treatment room, updating the resource status to available.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient being discharged.

room_id.description: The ID of the room to be vacated.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_clinical_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates a standardized clinical protocol for a patient. Used for data acquisition, triage levels, and specialized treatment bundles.

patient_id.description: The patient subject to the protocol.

action_set_definitions.name: transfer_to_room
action_set_definitions.description: Physically assigns and moves a patient from the waiting room to an empty exam room.

patient_id.description: The ID of the patient to move.

target_room_id.description: The ID of the vacant exam room.

state_description.patients_in_waiting_room: List of patients currently waiting for triage or bed assignment, including ID, chief complaint, and arrival time.
state_description.active_cases: Mapping of patient IDs to their current clinical status, vitals, and assigned ESI levels.
state_description.resource_status: Current status of hospital resources like Trauma Bays, Exam Rooms, and Nursing Staff availability.
state_description.simulation_clock: Total elapsed minutes since the start of the shift.
